Correll, Sue Carol. </div>&#160;\n<div lang=\"en\" dir=\"ltr\" class=\"description en\" style=\"display:inline;\"><a href=\"/wiki/Commons:Media_help\" title=\"Commons:Media help\">Problems playing the file?</a></div>\n</div>\n<p><br />\n</p>\n<div class=\"plainlinks hlist mainpage-box-seealso\">\n<ul><li><a rel=\"nofollow\" class=\"external text\" href=\"https://twitter.com/share?url=https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Check_and_Double_Check_(1930)_by_Melville_W._Brown.webm&amp;via=WikiCommons&amp;text=Check+out+today%27s+%23MediaOfTheDay+on+Wikimedia+Commons+at&amp;related=WikiCommons,Wikipedia\"><b>Tweet</b></a></li>\n<li><a class=\"external text\" href=\"https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/api.php?action=featuredfeed&amp;feed=motd&amp;feedformat=rss&amp;language=en\">RSS feed</a></li>\n<li><a href=\"/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Commons:Media_of_the_day\" title=\"Special:MyLanguage/Commons:Media of the day\">Previous <i>Media of the day</i></a></li></ul>\n</div></div>\n</div>\n<div class=\"mainpage-box mainpage-box-orange\">\n<div class=\"mainpage-box-title\">Participating</div>\n<div class=\"mainpage-box-content\"><div class=\"unregisteredonly plainlinks\"><span class=\"plainlinks\"><a href=\"/wiki/Special:UserLogin\" title=\"Special:UserLogin\"><span class=\"mw-ui-button\" role=\"button\" style=\"\">Log&#160;in</span></a></span> <span class=\"plainlinks\"><a href=\"/wiki/Special:UserLogin/signup\" title=\"Special:UserLogin/signup\"><span class=\"mw-ui-button\" role=\"button\" style=\"\">Create&#160;account</span></a></span></div>\n<dl><dt>Browsing?</dt>\n<dd>Please use the search box at the top of this page or the links to the right. Feel free to subscribe to our <a href=\"/wiki/Commons:Feeds\" title=\"Commons:Feeds\">syndicated feeds</a>.</dd>\n<dt>Using?</dt>\n<dd>To fulfill the free license requirements, please read our <a href=\"/wiki/Commons:Reusing_content_outside_Wikimedia\" title=\"Commons:Reusing content outside Wikimedia\">Reuse</a> guide. You can also <a href=\"/wiki/Commons:File_requests\" title=\"Commons:File requests\">request a file</a>.</dd>\n<dt>Identifying?</dt>\n<dd>Have a browse through <a href=\"/wiki/Category:Unidentified_subjects\" title=\"Category:Unidentified subjects\">Category:Unidentified subjects</a>. If you find something you can identify, write a note on the item's talk page.</dd>\n<dt>Creating?</dt>\n<dd>Check out all you need to know at our <a href=\"/wiki/Commons:Contributing_your_own_work\" title=\"Commons:Contributing your own work\">Contributing your own work</a> guide.</dd>\n<dt>and more!</dt>\n<dd>To explore more ways you can contribute to this project, check out the <a href=\"/wiki/Commons:Community_portal\" title=\"Commons:Community portal\">Community Portal</a>.</dd></dl>\n</div>\n</div>\n</td>\n<td class=\"mainpage-column-right\">\n<div class=\"mainpage-box mainpage-box-green\">\n<div class=\"mainpage-box-title\">Wiki Loves Folklore</div>\n<div class=\"mainpage-box-content\">\n<figure class=\"mw-halign-right\" typeof=\"mw:File\"><a href=\"/wiki/File:Wiki-Loves-Love-logo.svg\" class=\"mw-file-description\"><img src=\"https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/a3/Wiki-Loves-Love-logo.svg/100px-Wiki-Loves-Love-logo.svg.png\" decoding=\"async\" width=\"100\" height=\"100\" class=\"mw-file-element\" srcset=\"https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/a3/Wiki-Loves-Love-logo.svg/150px-Wiki-Loves-Love-logo.svg.png 1.5x, https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/a3/Wiki-Loves-Love-logo.svg/200px-Wiki-Loves-Love-logo.svg.png 2x\" data-file-width=\"1024\" data-file-height=\"1024\" /></a><figcaption></figcaption></figure> <div style=\"margin-left: 0.3em; padding-right: 0.6em; line-height: 1.5; color: #000; font-size: 1.6em\">Upload your local culture photos during Wiki Loves Folklore 2024. <a href=\"/wiki/Commons:Wiki_Loves_Folklore_2024\" title=\"Commons:Wiki Loves Folklore 2024\"><b>Learn more about the contest!</b></a></div> <div align=\"center\" style=\"margin: 1em;\"><span class=\"plainlinks\"><a class=\"external text\" href=\"https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:UploadWizard&amp;campaign=wlf_2024\"><span class=\"submit ui-button ui-widget ui-state-default ui-corner-all ui-button-text-icons ui-button-blue ui-button-large\" role=\"button\"><span class=\"ui-button-icon-primary ui-icon ui-icon-heart\">&#160;</span><span class=\"ui-button-text\"><b>Upload an image to Wiki Loves Folklore</b></span><span class=\"ui-button-icon-secondary ui-icon ui-icon-heart\">&#160;</span></span></a></span> </div></div></div><div class=\"mainpage-box mainpage-box-green\">\n<div class=\"mainpage-box-title\">Monthly photo challenge</div>\n<div class=\"mainpage-box-content\">\n<figure class=\"mw-halign-right\" typeof=\"mw:File\"><a href=\"/wiki/File:Generic_Camera_Icon.svg\" class=\"mw-file-description\"><img src=\"https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/37/Generic_Camera_Icon.svg/100px-Generic_Camera_Icon.svg.png\" decoding=\"async\" width=\"100\" height=\"84\" class=\"mw-file-element\" srcset=\"https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/37/Generic_Camera_Icon.svg/150px-Generic_Camera_Icon.svg.png 1.5x, https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/37/Generic_Camera_Icon.svg/200px-Generic_Camera_Icon.svg.png 2x\" data-file-width=\"334\" data-file-height=\"282\" /></a><figcaption></figcaption></figure> <div style=\"margin-left: 0.3em; padding-right: 0.6em; line-height: 1.3; color: #000; font-size: 1.4em\">Take some photos and upload them to meet our monthly thematic challenge, get inspiration and try new subjects! <a href=\"/wiki/Commons:Photo_challenge\" title=\"Commons:Photo challenge\"><b>Learn more about the challenges!</b></a></div> <div align=\"center\" style=\"margin: 1em;\"> <span class=\"plainlinks\"><a href=\"/wiki/Commons:Photo_challenge#Challenges_open_for_submission\" title=\"Commons:Photo challenge\"><span class=\"mw-ui-button mw-ui-progressive\" role=\"button\" style=\"\"><b>Check out this month's challenges</b></span></a></span>\n</div></div></div>\n<div class=\"mainpage-box mainpage-box-blue\">\n<div class=\"mainpage-box-title\">Highlights</div>\n<div class=\"mainpage-box-content\">\n<p>If you are browsing Commons for the first time, you may want to start with <b><a href=\"/wiki/Commons:Featured_pictures\" title=\"Commons:Featured pictures\">Featured pictures</a></b>,  <b><a href=\"/wiki/Commons:Quality_images\" title=\"Commons:Quality images\">Quality images</a></b>, <b><a href=\"/wiki/Commons:Valued_images\" title=\"Commons:Valued images\">Valued images</a></b> or  <b><a href=\"/wiki/Commons:Featured_media\" title=\"Commons:Featured media\">Featured media</a></b>.<br /><br />You can also see some work created by our highly skilled contributors in <b><a href=\"/wiki/Commons:Meet_our_photographers\" title=\"Commons:Meet our photographers\">Meet our photographers</a></b> and <b><a href=\"/wiki/Commons:Meet_our_illustrators\" title=\"Commons:Meet our illustrators\">Meet our illustrators</a></b>. You may also be interested in <b><a href=\"/wiki/Commons:Picture_of_the_Year\" title=\"Commons:Picture of the Year\">Picture of the Year</a></b>.\n</p>\n</div></div>\n<div class=\"mainpage-box
